plurals.name: settings_bili_reauth_stale_message
plurals.item: The current Cookie has been stored for more than %1$d day. The app cannot determine the server-side expiry precisely, but it may fail when used. Last saved at: %2$s. It is recommended to sign in again or import a fresh Cookie now.

The current Cookie has been stored for more than %1$d days. The app cannot determine the server-side expiry precisely, but it may fail when used. Last saved at: %2$s. It is recommended to sign in again or import a fresh Cookie now.
